calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-049 BG gating wider-seed sweep under StepHarness (Tier-1 diagnostic)
items.note: Tier-1 StepHarness retest. EXQ-514d (seeds [42,43,44]) showed ever_committed only on seed 44 -- rv was pinned, so the BG gate had no live commit-threshold signal. Wider seed sweep [42-47] under StepHarness clearly distinguishes monomodal-seed-44 from gate-functional-across-seeds. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: MECH-307 commit-gating discriminative ablation (539 cloud-1 manifest unsynced; mac re-run)
items.note: EXQ-539 ran on ree-cloud-1 2026-05-08T14:56-16:16Z FAIL (4808s, ARM_ON liking=2711 pred_writes=2711 approach_rate=1.0 per_seed=[1.0,1.0,1.0]) but manifest written to /home/ree/... on cloud-1 was never pushed to REE_assembly evidence dir. Re-run on Mac for clean local manifest + emit_outcome sentinel. Discriminative ablation paired to EXQ-536b downstream-chain-inert finding. Per-claim direction emitted in manifest for MECH-307/216/205/093/SD-014.
